overall.description: A third-person game sequence following a character in a futuristic suit through a neon-lit industrial corridor overgrown with vegetation. The character approaches a holographic advertisement, turns back, takes an elevator down, and emerges onto elevated walkways overlooking a dark industrial complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown industrial corridor with vertical neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a covered walkway lined with green neon lights and overgrown vegetation

entered.detail: vertical fluorescent light strips emitting green light along the corridor walls
industrial metal fencing and mesh panels lining the walkway
green vines and plants growing over the metal structures
large glowing advertisement poster at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow industrial corridor illuminated by vertical green neon lights. Vines and vegetation overgrow the metal mesh walls. The camera follows from behind as the character approaches a holographic poster visible at the corridor's end.

scene_state.functional_zone: holographic advertisement display at corridor end

events.description: character stops walking to view the holographic poster
character turns around 180 degrees to walk back

agents.ego_description: stopping to observe the holographic advertisement showing a couple and the text 'A BETTER TOMORROW', then turning around

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the end of the corridor to view a large holographic advertisement poster depicting a couple walking toward a bright archway with the text 'A BETTER TOMORROW'. After a moment, the character turns around and begins walking back down the corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevator transition area and elevator interior

events.description: character enters the elevator at the end of the corridor
character interacts with the level selection panel inside the elevator
elevator begins descending, view of outside industrial area becomes visible

agents.ego_description: walking back through the corridor, entering an elevator, and interacting with the level selection control panel

entered.detail: metal elevator doors at the end of the walkway
digital control panel with red text displaying 'LEVEL SELECTION'
glass windows showing the industrial exterior as the elevator descends

segments.scene_description: The character walks back down the corridor and enters an elevator. Inside, the character approaches a level selection panel and interacts with it. The elevator begins to descend, revealing views of a vast industrial complex through the glass windows.

events.description: exiting the elevator into the dark industrial walkway area
character looks over railing revealing red lights and machinery in the darkness below

agents.ego_description: exiting the elevator and walking along elevated walkways, pausing to look over the railing at the industrial complex below

entered.detail: metal grated walkways with railings extending through the dark industrial space
red warning lights and glowing machinery visible in the depths below the walkway
massive metal beams, pipes, and industrial architecture surrounding the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character exits the elevator into a dark, cavernous industrial area. Walking along elevated metal walkways, the character looks over the railing at red lights and machinery glowing in the darkness below. The environment features massive industrial structures and metal beams barely visible in the low light.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a neon-lit industrial corridor into the depths of a dark, cavernous industrial complex. It begins by following a character through a narrow passage where vertical green neon lights illuminate metal mesh walls overgrown with vines, moving steadily toward a holographic poster at the corridor's end. After the character pauses to view the advertisement depicting a bright archway, the camera pivots as they turn back and retreat down the hall to enter an elevator. As the elevator descends, the enclosed space opens up through glass windows to reveal a vast industrial landscape before the character exits into a dim, expansive area. The scene finally shifts to a walk along elevated metal walkways, looking down over railings at glowing red machinery and massive beams shrouded in darkness.
